title: The Permafrost Choir
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A climate research team drilling into Siberian permafrost unearths a cache of frozen human vocal cords that, when thawed, emit a hum that compels anyone who hears it to sing their own darkest secret aloud before falling into a catatonic trance.
long_description: A climate research team drilling into Siberian permafrost unearths a cache of frozen human vocal cords that, when thawed, emit a hum that compels anyone who hears it to sing their own darkest secret aloud before falling into a catatonic trance.
